connectors.name: 0V
connectors.description: Connect to the 0V (ground) of the power supply in your circuit

connectors.name: COM - Common
connectors.description: Connect this pin to the positive rail of the power supply to which the loads controlled by the outputs are connected to

connectors.name: Out 7
connectors.description: This is the output controlled by input 'In 7'. This is an open-collector output with an internal diode clamp to pin 9 (COM)
